headline: Woman's 'Manifesting' Vision Board Has A Photo Of Her Ex 'Being Happy' — Without Her
summary: She's manifesting his downfall. He's manifesting a promotion. Guess who's winning? Not her.
fullBody: Amanda Manifesting has a vision board covered in photos of her ex smiling. 'I'm manifesting his regret,' Amanda said. Her ex is engaged. 'He's happy,' Amanda said. 'It's part of my plan.' Her therapist has suggested 'maybe removing the photos.' Amanda added more. 'I'm committed,' she said. Her ex has no idea. Amanda's board also includes a photo of herself 'winning' — no details on what she's winning.
